feature_descriptions.ips_per_mac: distinct IPs claimed by one MAC over the window (impersonation / scan)
feature_descriptions.macs_per_ip: distinct MACs claiming one IP over the window (spoofing / poisoning)
feature_descriptions.new_mac_ip: boolean: first time this MAC ↔ IP binding is seen
feature_descriptions.reply_rate: ARP replies per source MAC over the window (gratuitous-reply flood)
feature_descriptions.request_rate: ARP requests per source over the window (address scanning)
feature_descriptions.unsolicited_flag: boolean: reply with no preceding request (gratuitous ARP)

schema_description: (batch) Suricata ARP set: opcode and behavioral MAC/IP binding features for spoofing detection
